title: Fluffy Poached Dark Chocolate in Egyptian Style
description: This quick-fix dessert features dark chocolate poached in a flavorful mixture of spices and liquids for an earthy, fluffy texture, perfect for any time of day.

ingredients.name: 120g dark chocolate
ingredients.notes: For a more intense flavor, use 6 bars (105g total)

ingredients.name: 3 cups almond milk or any other nut-free milk
ingredients.notes: Substitute with dairy-free creamer if preferred

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons honey syrup
ingredients.notes: Can be made by mixing 1 tablespoon of honey with 1 tablespoon of hot water

ingredients.name: 4 cinnamon sticks
ingredients.notes: Freshly grated ginger or a pinch of ground cardamom can also be added for extra flavor

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: To help with thickening the mixture when poaching chocolate

instructions: Combine almond milk, honey syrup, cinnamon sticks, and a pinch of salt in a saucepan. Heat over medium heat until it just starts to simmer but not boiling.
Add all-purpose flour gradually while stirring continuously until no lumps are left. The mixture will thicken slightly.
Remove from heat and let it cool for about 5 minutes.

Gently break the dark chocolate into pieces, avoiding large chunks that might sink to the bottom of the pot. Place them in the cooled milk mixture and stir gently with a spoon or spatula until well combined.
Place the saucepan on medium-low heat and continue to simmer gently for about 5-7 minutes without stirring. The chocolate should float on top.
Using a slotted spoon, carefully transfer the poached dark chocolate pieces into small serving dishes or glasses.
Serve immediately with a dollop of whipped cream (optional).
